vars.pitch: MedScribe is an AI medical scribing app for US dermatology clinics, billed monthly per provider.

candidates.name: ScribeTech
candidates.summary: ScribeTech sold AI medical scribing to US primary-care clinics 2019-2023. Lost to bundled EHR features.

candidates.name: PatientLoop
candidates.summary: PatientLoop offered patient-engagement SMS for US dental practices 2017-2022. Churned out as Solutionreach copied features.

market.rationale: US healthtech SMB clinics; specialty differs (dermatology vs primary care).

gtm.rationale: Both sell direct to small clinics; similar sales motion.

ranked.rationale: Direct competitor product category at the same buyer profile.

business_model.rationale: Engagement/messaging vs scribing; recurring SaaS shape only.

market.rationale: Adjacent SMB clinic buyer but different product workflow.

gtm.rationale: Direct sales to small clinics overlaps.

ranked.rationale: Similar buyer but different product category.
